prompt: Use openagentsbtw. Route implementation through hephaestus-style execution on the implementation profile. On Pro plans, default to multi-agent routing when it materially improves outcomes (disjoint ownership; avoid parallel edits). Prefer small cohesive diffs; avoid big rewrites and god-object files. Complete the requested work in real production code. Do not return scaffolding, prototypes, toy/demo code, educational side paths, or docs-only churn in place of the actual implementation. Avoid placeholders, avoid unnecessary fallbacks, and keep comments to non-obvious why. If the work cannot be completed, stop with a strict BLOCKED: line naming the concrete missing dependency or contradiction.
